title: Philippine Payroll Knowledge Base — data file
description: The common envelope every data/*.json rate file conforms to. Per-file payload (brackets, annual, matrix, leaves, examples, …) is allowed as additional properties. Validated on every push by tools/build-data.mjs --check; external consumers can validate with any JSON Schema 2020-12 validator. (data/index.json is the directory index, not a rate file, and is exempt.)

volatility.description: continuously-changing = re-pull the cited golden source before relying on it (today only minimum wage).

issuance.description: The exact issuing document (circular / regulation / advisory).

markdown.description: The verified markdown file this JSON is generated from and validated against.
